positive: A hyper-detailed, stylish illustration of a whimsical woodland creature portrait: a gentle, smiling fox sitting amongst oversized, stylized flowers and bioluminescent mushrooms. The fox has a clean, sleek silhouette and is adorned with delicate floral garlands. The composition is central, highly symmetrical, and suitable for repeat print. Use a deep jewel-tone color palette (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with warm ochre and ivory highlights. The style should be a mix of modern botanical etching and linocut print, emphasizing strong, graphic lines and high contrast. The background should be abstract and highly textured, almost like stained glass or deep velvet, allowing the main subjects to pop. Studio lighting, vector illustration quality, maximalist yet clean, perfect for t-shirt printing.
